description_long: This house is a modern, multi-story residence set on a sloped, triangular plot surrounded by tall, slender trees. The structure features a combination of dark stone and wood paneling, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The building is composed of several interlocking volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. The roofline is predominantly flat, with some sections at varying heights, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a paved entryway and a retaining wall that follows the contour of the land. The overall design emphasizes integration with the natural environment and maximizes views through expansive glazing.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, dark stone and wood exteriors, and large asymmetrical windows, set on a sloped, tree-filled plot.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with a mix of dark stone and wood, large windows, and the paved entryway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the wood-paneled section and the staggered volumes, with the trees densely packed behind the house.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals more of the flat roof sections and the integration of the house with the sloped terrain and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: From this angle, the house is partially obscured by trees, emphasizing the secluded, forested setting and the layered building volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved approach, minimal overhang, and a modern door integrated into the facade
